feature: Return2 - Return single expression (correctly projecting an expression)

scenarios.id: Return2 - Return single expression (correctly projecting an expression)-[7] Adding list properties in projection
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)
RETURN a.list2 + a.list1 AS foo

scenarios.id: Return2 - Return single expression (correctly projecting an expression)-[11] RETURN does not lose precision on large integers
scenarios.description: [11] RETURN does not lose precision on large integers

scenarios.id: Return2 - Return single expression (correctly projecting an expression)-[12] Projecting a list of nodes and relationships
scenarios.description: [12] Projecting a list of nodes and relationships
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)-[r]->(m)
RETURN [n, r, m] AS r

scenarios.id: Return2 - Return single expression (correctly projecting an expression)-[13] Projecting a map of nodes and relationships
scenarios.description: [13] Projecting a map of nodes and relationships
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)-[r]->(m)
RETURN {node1: n, rel: r, node2: m} AS m
